category_sources: source_facts.description says Circumflex is Hacker News in your terminal.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides circumflex; official GitHub README uses the Circumflex project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project; its README contains installation, usage, settings, and keymaps.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/bensadeh/circumflex; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Hacker News terminal browsing; source_facts.executables lists clx as the CLI executable.
